locations.name: 卡尔·林奈
locations.summary: 卡尔·冯·林奈（瑞典語：Carl von Linné；1707年5月23日—1778年1月10日），也譯為林内、林耐，原名卡尔·林奈乌斯（Carl Linnaeus），瑞典生物学家，瑞典科学院创始人兼第一任主席。林奈奠定了现代生物学命名法…

locations.name: 自然系统第十版
locations.summary: 《自然系统》第十版（英語：10th edition of Systema Naturae）是18世纪瑞典生物学家卡尔·林奈所撰写的生物学专著，于1758年和1759年分别出版上下两卷。林奈在书中为动物定义了二名法命名法则（此前他曾在175…

locations.name: 聖赫勒拿島戴勝
locations.summary: 聖赫勒拿島戴勝（学名：Upupa antaios），又名大戴勝，是已滅絕的戴勝，但只有一個不完整的亞化石骨骼。 聖赫勒拿島戴勝是大西洋聖赫勒拿島的特有種。牠們較歐洲及非洲的近親明顯較大，而且不能飛。唯一的骨骼是於1975年由奧爾森（Sto…

relations.subject: 戴勝屬
relations.evidence: |editor=Jonathan Alderfer |year=2006 |publisher=National Geographic Society |isbn=0-7922-4175-4 |page=360 }} Hoopoes have been known to breed north of their European range, and in southern England during warm, dry summers that provide plenty of grasshoppers and similar insects, although as of the early 1980s northern European populations were reported to be in the decline, possibly due to changes in climate. The hoopoe has two basic requirements of its habitat: bare or lightly vegetated ground on which to forage and vertical surfaces with cavities (such as trees, cliffs or even walls, nestboxes, haystacks, and abandoned burrows) in which to nest
relations.object_summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

relations.subject: 戴勝屬
relations.evidence: These requirements can be provided in a wide range of ecosystems, and as a consequence the hoopoe inhabits a wide range of habitats such as heathland, wooded steppes, savannas and grasslands, as well as forest glades
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
